/usr/local/arm/gcc-linaro-7.5.0-2019.12-x86_64_aarch64-linux-gnu/bin/aarch64-linux-gnu-gcc CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/main.c.o -o main   -L/mnt/hgfs/Rk3568_Code/1_交叉开发/5_cmake/02-code/classtest/example7/./lib  -Wl,-rpath,/mnt/hgfs/Rk3568_Code/1_交叉开发/5_cmake/02-code/classtest/example7/./lib:/mnt/hgfs/Rk3568_Code/1_交叉开发/5_cmake/02-code/classtest/example7/build/lib lib/libadd.so lib/libsub.a
